title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Queen, Unknown person #6, Caribou, Unknown person #7, Hyogoro as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yo. Queen here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: YeaA!!!!! Queen!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: Chief Jailer Babanuki here. Reporting from UDon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like you brought the Smails back online, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I brought quite a few men with me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're short hands, we can spare some. I'll head over.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's still trying to make a casual exit from ONI- Gashima!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We do not need any help for the time being.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And he got rejected!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: straw hat Luffy, Captain Kidd, and all other trouble- makers

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Have been locked away in cells!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just wanted to report that nothing was out of the ordinary.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: "You sure? Want me to come check?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Lord Queen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The call is finished.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How was that, master?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: MM. Well done. Good boy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What reasons magic! To be able to use a millet Dango to control the enemy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apparently it works on animals and anyone with animal-type magic powers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: KIHihihi! Thisings went quite well!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now we've got a few thousand Samurai that are supposed to be locked up on our side!

dialogue.speaker: Caribou
dialogue.text: It's all thanks to you, caribou.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed. y'all owe me a favor now, see?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Lord Choppaemon! This debt!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We intend to repay it, even if it costs us our lives!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's okay. That virus was actually pretty easy to deal with.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't need you guys to be in my "debt." Sounds intense.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm glad LuffyTARO's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Back in action, though!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Lemme hear it, boys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yeeeaa a Aahhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Luffy- TAROO!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fufu... just by bringing back Lord Momo- Suke,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's won this much trust.

dialogue.speaker: Hyogoro
dialogue.text: Boss Hyogorogoro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I never expected us to meet again. Not in this life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ooo! The Yakuza bosses of each village!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Blood- Letter OOMASA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Broken- hat Tsuna- Goro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Same here. I'm glad all of you are safe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Moon- flower o-chou!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please! Do not shower us with your praise!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And snake-eye Yatappe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes! Almost like you shouldn't go to the toilet after taking a bath!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Now, we must away!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will gather up the remaining rebels that are in hiding throughout the country!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 49 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
